title: WIHP Igikoresho cy'Imvugo Kitagira Imipaka
subtitle: Andika ijambo iriryose → Bona IPA kuri Wiktionary → Hindura Hangul!
step2c: • Indimi zose 117 zifite ubufasha bwa IPA 100%!
step3: 3. 🏆 IPA → Imvugo ya Hangul itagira inenge
canConvert: Ushobora guhindura amagambo ava mu ndimi 117 z'isi, harimo indimi z'Ubuhinde zirenze 20!
philosophy: Amagambo ntakwiye kugira imipaka. WIHP ishimira Wiktionary IPA.
